Table of contents

  • 1 Loading packages
  • 2 Delta Bulk
  • 3 Link PGP / Lambda

Functional analysis

Author

Victor ANGOT

Note

To be able to run this code, please download “identified_KO.csv”, “pred_metagenome_unstrat.tsv” and “SD5_pisum_phylogeny.tre” (phylo_pois.tre in the code) from the zenodo link: “https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19066852” and run previously the analysis presented in: “Data_preparation.html” and “Ecological_analyses_html” and “Phylogenetic_analyses.html”

1 Loading packages

Code 
library(compositions)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tibble)
library(ape)
library(tidyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(vegan)

#Loading data

Code 
preidentified_KO <- read.csv("data/identified_KO.csv", sep = ";") %>%
  mutate(KO_prefixed = paste0("ko:", ko))

pred_metagenome <- read.delim("data/pred_metagenome_unstrat.tsv", 
                              row.names = 1, check.names = FALSE)


ko_clr_all <- clr(pred_metagenome + 1)

tree_pea= read.tree("data/phylo_pois.tre")
phylo_order=tree_pea$tip.label

design=read.csv(file="data/design_propre.csv",sep=";")

common_samples <- intersect(colnames(ko_clr_all), design$sample)

ko_clr_all_sub <- ko_clr_all[, common_samples, drop = FALSE]

design_sub <- design %>%
  filter(sample %in% common_samples) %>%
  slice(match(common_samples, sample))

stopifnot(all(colnames(ko_clr_all_sub) == design_sub$sample))

mydf=read.csv(file="data/mydf_hard_cleaned_0_005.csv",sep=";")

2 Delta Bulk

Code 
process_levels <- preidentified_KO %>%
  filter(KO_prefixed %in% rownames(ko_clr_all_sub)) %>%
  distinct(Process) %>%
  pull(Process)


ko_long <- ko_clr_all_sub %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("KO") %>%
  pivot_longer(-KO, names_to = "Sample", values_to = "CLR") %>%
  left_join(
    design_sub %>% select(sample, comp, nom_genotype),
    by = c("Sample" = "sample")
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    preidentified_KO %>% select(KO_prefixed, Process),
    by = c("KO" = "KO_prefixed")
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Process)) %>%
  mutate(
    Condition = factor(comp,
      levels = c("Bulk", "Bulk_T0", "R", "Rp", "E", "N")
    ),
    Process = factor(Process, levels = process_levels),
    nom_genotype = factor(nom_genotype, levels = rev(phylo_order))
  )


bulk_ref <- ko_long %>%
  filter(Condition == "Bulk") %>%
  group_by(Process) %>%
  summarise(Bulk_ref = mean(CLR, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")



plot_df <- ko_long %>%
  filter(Condition != "Bulk") %>%
  group_by(Process, Condition, nom_genotype) %>%
  summarise(mean_CLR = mean(CLR, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(bulk_ref, by = "Process") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Bulk_ref)) %>%
  mutate(delta_CLR = mean_CLR - Bulk_ref)


plot_df <- plot_df %>%
  left_join(
    design_sub %>% select(nom_genotype, sub_species) %>% distinct(),
    by = "nom_genotype"
  )

plot_df$sub_species <- factor(plot_df$sub_species)


plots_by_comp <- split(plot_df, plot_df$Condition)
plots_by_comp <- plots_by_comp[names(plots_by_comp) != "Bulk_T0"]
plots_by_comp <- plots_by_comp[names(plots_by_comp) != "Bulk"]
for (comp_i in names(plots_by_comp)) {
  
  df_plot <- plots_by_comp[[comp_i]]
  
  # Forcer l'ordre des génotypes
  df_plot$nom_genotype <- factor(df_plot$nom_genotype, levels = rev(phylo_order))
  
  p <- ggplot(df_plot,
              aes(x = nom_genotype, y = delta_CLR, fill = sub_species)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
    geom_col(width = 0.7) +
    facet_wrap(~ Process, nrow = 1) +
    labs(
      title = paste("ΔCLR vs Bulk –", comp_i),
      x = "",
      y = "Δ CLR",
      fill = "Sub-species"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_blank(),  
      axis.ticks.x = element_blank(), 
      legend.position = "bottom"
    )
  
  ggsave(
    paste0("plot/validation_CLR_Process_delta_vs_Bulk_",
           comp_i, "_bySubspecies_facets.png"),
    p, width = 16, height = 6
  )
  
saveRDS(p, file = paste0("plot/validation_CLR_Process_delta_vs_Bulk_",
           comp_i, "_bySubspecies_facets.rds"))

print(p)
}
Code 
plot_df_summary <- ko_long %>%
  filter(!Condition %in% c("Bulk", "Bulk_T0")) %>%  
  group_by(Process, Condition) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_CLR = mean(CLR, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_CLR = sd(CLR, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    se_CLR = sd_CLR / sqrt(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(bulk_ref, by = "Process") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Bulk_ref)) %>%
  mutate(
    delta_CLR = mean_CLR - Bulk_ref,
    Condition = factor(Condition, levels = c("R", "Rp", "E", "N"))
  )


print(unique(plot_df_summary$Condition))
[1] R  Rp E  N 
Levels: R Rp E N
Code 
p_summary <- ggplot(plot_df_summary, 
                    aes(x = Condition, y = delta_CLR, fill = Condition)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = delta_CLR - se_CLR, ymax = delta_CLR + se_CLR), 
                width = 0.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ Process, nrow = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "ΔCLR vs Bulk – Moyenne par condition",
    x = "Condition",
    y = "Δ CLR moyen (± SE)",
    fill = "Condition"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.text = element_text(size = 10)
  )

print(p_summary)
Code 
ggsave("plot/validation_CLR_Process_delta_vs_Bulk_conditions_summary.svg", 
       p_summary, width = 16, height = 8)

3 Link PGP / Lambda

Code 
lambda_genotype=read.csv(file="results/all_lambda_compartiments_genotypes.csv",sep=",")

str(lambda_genotype)
'data.frame':   96 obs. of  7 variables:
 $ genotype    : chr  "KAYANNE" "CAPSICUM" "CAMEOR" "CHAMPAGNE" ...
 $ compartment : chr  "Bulk_vs E" "Bulk_vs E" "Bulk_vs E" "Bulk_vs E" ...
 $ lambda      : num  0.911 0.856 0.865 0.896 0.863 0.904 0.842 0.836 0.834 0.891 ...
 $ n_ASV       : int  729 760 727 609 692 743 712 745 723 819 ...
 $ mean_logFC  : num  -3.12 -2.81 -3.14 -5.08 -3.69 ...
 $ median_logFC: num  -6.67 -6.42 -6.67 -7.05 -6.67 ...
 $ n_sig       : int  648 652 635 562 617 684 603 621 601 728 ...
Code 
lambda_genotype$comp <- sub("^Bulk_vs\\s*", "", lambda_genotype$compartment)


plot_df <- plot_df %>%
  rename(comp = Condition)

df_corr <- plot_df %>%
  left_join(
    lambda_genotype %>%
      select(genotype, comp, lambda),
    by = c("nom_genotype" = "genotype", "comp" = "comp")
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(lambda))

stopifnot(nrow(df_corr) > 0)


corr_summary <- list()

for (comp_i in unique(df_corr$comp)) {

  df_comp <- df_corr %>% filter(comp == comp_i)

  for (proc_i in unique(df_comp$Process)) {

    df_sub <- df_comp %>% filter(Process == proc_i)
    if (nrow(df_sub) < 5) next

    cor_res <- cor.test(df_sub$lambda, df_sub$delta_CLR)
    corr_summary[[length(corr_summary) + 1]] <- data.frame(
  comp       = comp_i,
  Process    = proc_i,
  n          = nrow(df_sub),
  r          = unname(cor_res$estimate),
  p_value    = cor_res$p.value,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

    r_val <- round(cor_res$estimate, 3)
    p_val <- signif(cor_res$p.value, 3)

    label_txt <- paste0("r = ", r_val, "\n", "p = ", p_val)

    p <- ggplot(df_sub, aes(x = lambda, y = delta_CLR, color = sub_species)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray60") +
  geom_point(size = 2.5, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.8, color = "black") +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = min(df_sub$lambda, na.rm = TRUE),
    y = max(df_sub$delta_CLR, na.rm = TRUE),
    label = label_txt,
    hjust = 0,
    vjust = 1,
    size = 4
  ) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Filtering–Function relationship"),
    subtitle = paste("Compartment:", comp_i, "| Process:", proc_i),
    x = "Host filtering intensity (λ)",
    y = "Functional deviation (ΔCLR)",
    color = "Sub-species"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)

    ggsave(
      filename = paste0(
        "plot_lambda_PGP/",
        "lambda_vs_deltaCLR_",
        comp_i, "_",
        gsub(" ", "_", proc_i),
        ".png"
      ),
      plot = p,
      width = 6,
      height = 5
    )
     rds_filename <- paste0(
      "plot_lambda_PGP/",
      "lambda_vs_deltaCLR_",
      comp_i, "_",
      gsub(" ", "_", proc_i),
      ".rds"
    )
    saveRDS(p, file = rds_filename)
    print(p)
  }
}
Code 
corr_summary_df <- bind_rows(corr_summary) %>%
  mutate(
    r = round(r, 3),
    p_value = signif(p_value, 3),
    signif = case_when(
      p_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p_value < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p_value < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE            ~ "ns"
    )
  )
write.csv(
  corr_summary_df,
  file = "plot_lambda_PGP/summary_lambda_vs_deltaCLR_correlations.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)
